    draw(Graphics) - Method in class gamestates.Menu
    Draws the menu background and buttons.
    draw(Graphics) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Draws the game elements such as the background, level, entities, and overlays.
    draw(Graphics) - Method in interface gamestates.StateMethods
     
    draw(Graphics) - Method in class ui.GameOverOverlay
    Draws the game over screen, including the background, death screen image, and buttons.
    draw(Graphics) - Method in class ui.LevelCompOverlay
    Draws the level completion screen, including the background image and buttons.
    draw(Graphics) - Method in class ui.PauseOverlay
    Draws the pause overlay, including the background and buttons.
    draw(Graphics) - Method in class ui.UrmButton
    Draws the button with the appropriate image for its current state.
    draw(Graphics2D) - Method in class ui.MenuButton
    Draws the button on the screen, using the appropriate image based on its state.
    draw(Graphics2D, int) - Method in class levels.LevelManager
    Draws the current level on the graphics context with the provided horizontal offset.
    draw(Graphics, int) - Method in class entities.EnemyManager
    Draws all active enemies.
